use_cases: Landing page hero section to introduce websites and capture user attention
Portfolio or personal website introduction with clean navigation
Product or service showcase pages with minimal visual distractions
Marketing landing pages requiring clear CTAs and brand positioning
ai_summary: A minimalist hero section component featuring clean typography, subtle entrance animations via Framer Motion, and organized navigation elements. The component includes a logo area, navigation links, social media icons, background image support with overlay text, and responsive design for both desktop and mobile platforms.
